evals.prompt: I have a .NET MAUI app using ZXing.Net.Maui for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with BarcodeCapture. Here is my page: ZxingMauiPage.xaml + ZxingMauiPage.xaml.cs
evals.expected_output: Removes the ZXing.Net.Maui XAML control, namespace, options, and event handler. Replaces with <scandit:DataCaptureView> + BarcodeCapture mode + HandlerChanged overlay creation. Maps the ZXing formats (Ean13, Code128, QrCode) to Scandit symbologies (Ean13Upca, Code128, Qr). Preserves the ScannedBarcode record and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: ZXing.Net.Maui using directives are NOT present in the new code
<zxing:CameraBarcodeReaderView is NOT present in the updated XAML (may appear in a before/after summary table)
The xmlns:zxing namespace is NOT present in the updated XAML
BarcodeReaderOptions is NOT present in the new code
Scandit.DataCapture using directives ARE present
<scandit:DataCaptureView> is present in the updated XAML
The xmlns:scandit="clr-namespace:Scandit.DataCapture.Core.UI.Maui;assembly=ScanditCaptureCoreMaui" namespace is added
The BarcodeScanned event is wired (barcodeCapture.BarcodeScanned += ...)
Symbology.Ean13Upca is enabled
Symbology.Code128 is enabled
Symbology.Qr is enabled (not Symbology.QrCode, which does not exist)
Symbology.QrCode does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (BarcodeFormat.QrCode in a summary table is acceptable)
BarcodeCaptureOverlay.Create(barcodeCapture) is called inside dataCaptureView.HandlerChanged
dataCaptureView.AddOverlay(overlay) is called
OnAppearing turns the camera on (SwitchToDesiredStateAsync(FrameSourceState.On))
OnDisappearing turns the camera off (SwitchToDesiredStateAsync(FrameSourceState.Off))
Permissions.RequestAsync<Permissions.Camera>() (or CheckStatusAsync<Permissions.Camera>()) is used
ScannedBarcode record is preserved in output
scannedBarcodes list is preserved in output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before adding) is preserved
MauiProgram.cs is updated to call .UseScanditCore(c => c.AddDataCaptureView()).UseScanditBarcode()
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions all four NuGet packages (Scandit.DataCapture.Core, Scandit.DataCapture.Core.Maui, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode.Maui)
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription (for iOS target) or Permissions.Camera (for both targets)
